shortlist_basis: Revised quality-equivalence rule over public synthetic fixture.

new_assessment_of_matching_profile.key_difference: No material information loss, but machine-readability is weaker because the output is split into Markdown fenced YAML sections.

selection_reason: gpt-5.5/low matched the gpt-5.5/xhigh baseline on material quality while using fewer output and reasoning tokens and the lowest measured wall time in this run.
